items.hook: The Rosy Crucifixion, a trilogy consisting of Sexus, Plexus, and Nexus, is a fictionalized account documenting the six-year period of Henry Miller's life in Brooklyn as he falls for his second wife June and struggles to become a writer, leading up to his initial departure for Paris in 1928.
items.body: The title comes from a sentence near the end of Miller's Tropic of Capricorn: "All my Calvaries were rosy crucifixions, pseudo-tragedies to keep the fires of hell burning brightly for the real sinners who are in danger of being forgotten." Worth a quiet trip d

items.hook: Led by Bassetlaw MP Jo White, the caucus was formed in November 2024 and has 43 members as of May 2025.
items.body: The Red Wall Caucus is a British political caucus and pressure group of backbench Labour MPs who represent red wall seats in the House of Commons. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: From Overshadowed to Overpowered: Second Reincarnation of a Talentless Sage is a Japanese light novel series written by Arata Shiraishi and illustrated by Uodenim.
items.body: It was originally published as a web novel on the online publication platform Shōsetsuka ni Narō in 2018, before Kadokawa Shoten began publishing it as a light novel under their Kadokawa Sneaker Bunko imprint, which ran from October 2019 to March 2022. Worth a

items.hook: Legend of the White Horse is a 1987 Polish-American adventure children's film directed by Jerzy Domaradzki and Janusz Morgenstern, based on the magic realism novel White Horse, Dark Dragon by Robert C.
